overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing an armored character holding a torch while exploring the foggy Caelid Highlands at dusk. The character walks continuously through grassy terrain with scattered pine trees, descending from a hilltop overlook toward ancient stone ruins in the misty valley below.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy highland overlook at dusk, with an armored character holding a torch standing on a grassy hilltop. Location text appears identifying the area as 'The Caelid Highlands' before the character begins walking down the slope toward the misty valley, with a distant fortress visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested highland slope with scattered rocks

events.description: distant stone ruins become visible through the fog ahead in the valley

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily downhill through grassy terrain scattered with pine trees and rocky outcrops

entered.detail: large gray boulders scattered on the right side of the path
descending terrain leading down into the foggy valley

segments.scene_description: The character descends through a forested highland slope, passing between pine trees and rocky outcrops. The distant fortress fades from view as the character moves deeper into the valley, while ancient stone ruins begin to emerge from the fog in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: valley floor approaching ancient stone ruins

events.description: character approaches and begins walking alongside the stone ruins

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through the valley, approaching and passing ancient stone ruins on the left side

entered.detail: ancient stone ruins and broken walls emerging from the fog
tall weathered stone wall of the ruins

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the valley floor where ancient stone ruins become prominent, walking alongside weathered stone walls and broken archways. The torchlight illuminates the immediate path as the character explores the foggy ruins, with pine trees now visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high, foggy overlook down into a valley of ancient stone ruins at dusk. It begins on a grassy hilltop where an armored character holds a torch, moving forward as location text identifies the area before the character descends the slope toward a distant fortress. As the character moves deeper into the valley, the fortress fades from view and the terrain shifts into a forested slope filled with pine trees and rocky outcrops. The scene then opens onto the valley floor, where the distant fog parts to reveal weathered stone walls and broken archways. Finally, the camera follows the character as they walk alongside these prominent ruins, with the torchlight illuminating the immediate path against a backdrop of distant pines.
